findings.description: PascalCase class names `MessageUtil`, `MessageLevel`, `Message` appear in the `CommonExclusiveControlUtil` code example in s1 but are absent from the s1 hints array.

findings.location: s1 — 一括更新処理における更新チェック（複合主キー）
findings.description: The source note states the framework provides `nablarch.common.web.compositekey.CompositeKey` class, `WebView_CompositeKeyCheckboxTag`, and `WebView_CompositeKeyRadioButtonTag` specifically to support composite-key batch update processing. These are not mentioned in the knowledge file. `CompositeKey` in particular is a concrete class name an implementer would need to know about when working with composite-key checkbox inputs.
findings.source_evidence: Source note: 「本フレームワークでは、:ref:`WebView_CompositeKeyCheckboxTag` と :ref:`WebView_CompositeKeyRadioButtonTag` 、nablarch.common.web.compositekey.CompositeKeyクラスを提供している。」
